metadata.title: AR Intégration — Web & mobile app agency in Lyon
metadata.description: Web and mobile agency in Lyon. Custom websites, iOS/Android apps, e-commerce. GDPR compliant, France-hosted, fast delivery.
metadata.ogDescription: Custom websites, iOS/Android apps, e-commerce. GDPR compliant, France-hosted, fast delivery.

hero.h1: Web & mobile apps, designed in Lyon, built for your customers.
hero.subtitle: Websites, iOS/Android mobile apps, custom e-commerce for SMBs, freelancers and liberal professions. GDPR compliant, hosted in France, delivered fast.

secteurs.title: Specialized in several industries, attentive to your activity.
secteurs.subtitle: 3 industry sub-brands with built-in compliance (health GDPR, legal privilege, French real-estate law). For other sectors, we build the solution with you.

medecins.name: Medical practices
medecins.tagline: GPs, dentists, physios, osteopaths, midwives. Health-grade GDPR compliance.

avocats.name: Law firms
avocats.tagline: Lawyers, notaries, jurists. Compatible with French Bar professional secrecy (RIN art. 2).

immobilier.name: Real-estate agencies
immobilier.tagline: Agencies, brokers, advisors. Sync with your business software + Hoguet law compliant.

autre.name: Other industry?
autre.tagline: Restaurants, craftsmen, coaches, e-commerce, SaaS, freelancers. We love a challenge.

services.title: Everything you need to exist online.

vitrine.title: Showcase websites
vitrine.text: Professional responsive websites, GDPR compliant, hosted in France. Local SEO included, delivered in 7 days.

ecom.title: E-commerce
ecom.text: Full online stores: catalog, cart, Stripe payment, inventory and back-office without complexity.

apps.title: Mobile apps
apps.text: Custom iOS and Android apps with back-office, push notifications, authentication, integrated payment.

custom.title: Custom & SaaS
custom.text: Complex projects: SaaS, dashboards, API integrations, automation. Tailored quote within 48h.

process.title: A simple, transparent process — no surprises.

step1.title: Discovery call (15 min)
step1.text: We talk by phone at the time that suits you. You present your project, your needs, your budget. No commitment.

step2.title: Tailored proposal (24h)
step2.text: You receive a detailed quote and a mockup of your future site / app within 24h. Everything is explained clearly, without technical jargon.

step3.title: Development (1-8 weeks)
step3.text: We code your project with real-time access to progress. You validate each step by email, no useless meetings.

step4.title: Launch and onboarding (1h)
step4.text: Live. We review together, hand over access, and provide support for at least 3 months. Updates within 48 business hours.

apropos.title: An indie studio that codes, in Lyon.
apropos.intro1: AR Intégration is Alain Rabie, web and mobile developer based in Villeurbanne (Lyon).
apropos.intro2: My principle: no empty promises, no jargon, no hidden costs. Direct conversation, clear quote, clean code, fast delivery. And behind it, a real human you can reach for every future change.
apropos.infoZoneValue: Lyon, metropolitan area, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, all of France (remote)

pillar1.title: Lyon, in person
pillar1.text: Indie studio based in Villeurbanne (69100). No outsourced hotline, no offshore agency: you talk directly with your developer.

pillar2.title: Custom code
pillar2.text: No WordPress / Wix / Shopify. Modern stack (Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind) for fast, secure, GDPR-by-design websites.

pillar3.title: Long-term commitment
pillar3.text: No 'disposable site': maintenance €200/month, modifications within 48h, no commission, you own 100% of your code and data.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions.
faq.q1: How much does a professional website cost?
faq.a1: A professional showcase site at AR Intégration starts at €690 (launch pricing) for Essential Presence, €1,050 for Connected with booking module, €1,750 for Premium with client area. An e-commerce store starts at €2,090, a mobile app at €3,490.
faq.q2: How long to deliver my website or app?
faq.a2: 7 business days for an Essential Presence showcase site. 10 days for Connected, 15 days for Premium. 4 to 8 weeks for a mobile app depending on complexity. Contractual commitment.
faq.q3: Will my site rank well on Google?
faq.a3: Yes. Local SEO included (Google My Business, Schema.org, meta tags). Sites built with Next.js and static export for Lighthouse scores 95+. For advanced national SEO, custom SEO articles can be added.
faq.q4: Will my data be hosted in France?
faq.a4: Yes. OVHcloud Roubaix or Strasbourg hosting on dedicated option (or Vercel Edge Europe region as standard). GDPR-by-design compliance, no third-party US service (Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel) without your explicit consent.
faq.q5: Can I edit my site myself?
faq.a5: No, AR Intégration sites are custom-coded (no WordPress-style CMS) — that's what guarantees their speed, security and GDPR compliance. Modifications are handled by AR Intégration within 48 business hours under the maintenance contract (€200/month after the 3 months included).
faq.q6: Do you work with specific industries?
faq.a6: Yes. Three dedicated industry sub-brands with built-in compliance: medecins.arintegration.fr (health GDPR, HDS mention), avocats.arintegration.fr (professional secrecy, French Bar rules), immobilier.arintegration.fr (Hoguet law, business software sync). And all other sectors on arintegration.fr.
faq.q7: What's the difference vs a classic agency or Wix / Shopify?
faq.a7: Wix and Shopify are tenant platforms: you don't own the code, SEO is limited, GDPR is not guaranteed. A classic agency often charges 5-10x more. AR Intégration: you own 100%, performant custom code, and a real human reachable directly in Lyon.
faq.q8: Do you accept business credit card payment?
faq.a8: Yes. Card, transfer, or installment plan in 3 installments without fees on request. 30% deposit at order, balance at delivery.

section.subtitle: Let's chat 15 minutes by phone. No commitment, no bullshit. Reply within 24 business hours.
